title: Ramshastri
director: Vishram Bedekar, Gajanan Jagirdar, Raja Nene
actors: Gajanan Jagirdar, Anant Marathe, Shakuntala Paranjpye
plot: An 18th century student given the honorific "Shastri" for his authority on religion, and uses his influence to speak out for honesty and justice, leading him to reject a court position for a life instead of prayer and asceticism.
